I need to check the current time first.

The current time is **2026-07-09 01:22:03** (1:22 AM on Thursday, July 9th, 2026).

**No, I don't start until 9 AM.**

I'm off the clock right now. Please come back during work hours (9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday) and I'll be happy to help you file that report.
